purpose: Provide full attribution for every fact, claim, and data point — enabling verification and further reading.
writingRules: Every source must include title, publisher, URL, and access date
Sources grouped by tier (primary, secondary, tertiary)
Government and official sources listed first
Dead links flagged — verify all URLs at time of publication
Include brief context for each source (why it was used, what it covers)
seoRules: Outbound links should use appropriate rel attributes
Sources section should be indexable but not primary content
